Your villagers report a gaunt man in tat.ru: Your villagers report a gaunt man in tattered robes quietly repairing the walls of stone huts. He works without speaking, without rest, asking for nothing. When approached, he only says he has much to make amends for.
Your villagers report a gaunt man in tat.zh: Your villagers report a gaunt man in tattered robes quietly repairing the walls of stone huts. He works without speaking, without rest, asking for nothing. When approached, he only says he has much to make amends for.

You decline. The night passes without ch.ru: Вы отказываетесь. Ночь проходит без радости, тепла и смеха.
You decline. The night passes without ch.zh: 你拒绝了。夜晚在没有欢乐、温暖或笑声中过去。

You cut them down without mercy. Their c.ru: You cut them down without mercy. Their cries echo through the caverns as they fall.
You cut them down without mercy. Their c.zh: You cut them down without mercy. Their cries echo through the caverns as they fall.

You lower your weapons and attempt to un.ru: You lower your weapons and attempt to understand them. Through gestures and broken words, they share fragments of their history leaving you speechless.
You lower your weapons and attempt to un.zh: You lower your weapons and attempt to understand them. Through gestures and broken words, they share fragments of their history leaving you speechless.

In the depths beyond the shattered gate,.ru: In the depths beyond the shattered gate, you find some creatures that don't attack. Their forms are vaguely human, twisted by generations in darkness. They gesture, attempting to communicate through broken words and signs.
In the depths beyond the shattered gate,.zh: In the depths beyond the shattered gate, you find some creatures that don't attack. Their forms are vaguely human, twisted by generations in darkness. They gesture, attempting to communicate through broken words and signs.

You send the one-eyed crow with a messag.ru: You send the one-eyed crow with a message to the Mountain Monastery. You wait for it to return.
You send the one-eyed crow with a messag.zh: You send the one-eyed crow with a message to the Mountain Monastery. You wait for it to return.

You send the one-eyed crow with a messag.ru: You send the one-eyed crow with a message to the Swamp Tribe. You wait for it to return.
You send the one-eyed crow with a messag.zh: You send the one-eyed crow with a message to the Swamp Tribe. You wait for it to return.

You send the one-eyed crow with a messag.zh: You send the one-eyed crow with a message to the Shore Fishermen. You wait for it to return.

A village elder approaches you and recom.ru: A village elder approaches you and recommends sending the crow out with a message to establish trade. Where to send a message first?
A village elder approaches you and recom.zh: A village elder approaches you and recommends sending the crow out with a message to establish trade. Where to send a message first?

The scholar creates a shadowy red mixtur.zh: The scholar creates a shadowy red mixture and instructs you to bathe in it. As you emerge from the bath, you feel stronger but also tainted.

You send the scholar away. He departs wi.ru: You send the scholar away. He departs with a disappointed sigh, but you sense he may return.
You send the scholar away. He departs wi.zh: You send the scholar away. He departs with a disappointed sigh, but you sense he may return.

The scholar departs, displeased by your.ru: The scholar departs, displeased by your indecision.

A scholar of the dark arts approaches yo.ru: A scholar of the dark arts approaches your estate. Upon seeing the three blood vials, he says, with a hint of restrained excitement, 'I can create a mixture that will grant you great power.'
A scholar of the dark arts approaches yo.zh: A scholar of the dark arts approaches your estate. Upon seeing the three blood vials, he says, with a hint of restrained excitement, 'I can create a mixture that will grant you great power.'

Upon closer inspection, it seems to have.ru: Upon closer inspection, it seems to have been merely an optical illusion. You breathe a sigh of relief.
Upon closer inspection, it seems to have.zh: Upon closer inspection, it seems to have been merely an optical illusion. You breathe a sigh of relief.

You lean close to one of the faces. Its.ru: You lean close to one of the faces. Its eyes snap open and it whispers your name. You recognize the face as someone who died long time ago.
You lean close to one of the faces. Its.zh: You lean close to one of the faces. Its eyes snap open and it whispers your name. You recognize the face as someone who died long time ago.

You try to ignore the faces, but they mu.ru: You try to ignore the faces, but they multiply. Soon every wooden surface in the village bears the mark of tortured souls. One morning they are all gone, as they were never there.
You try to ignore the faces, but they mu.zh: You try to ignore the faces, but they multiply. Soon every wooden surface in the village bears the mark of tortured souls. One morning they are all gone, as they were never there.

The wooden walls of your huts have begun.zh: The wooden walls of your huts have begun showing faces - twisted, agonized expressions that seem to push through from the other side. They mouth silent screams and pleas. The villagers step around them as if they've always been there.

Your finger aches softly, but you leave.ru: Your finger aches softly, but you leave it be for now. It almost feels like a faint pulsing against your skin.

No matter how hard you try, the ring won.ru: No matter how hard you try, the ring won't come off. It almost seems fused to your flesh. Your finger aches softly, but you leave it be for now. It almost feels like a faint pulsing against your skin.
No matter how hard you try, the ring won.zh: No matter how hard you try, the ring won't come off. It almost seems fused to your flesh. Your finger aches softly, but you leave it be for now. It almost feels like a faint pulsing against your skin.

An older villager approaches you, his ey.ru: An older villager approaches you, his eyes heavy with knowledge. 'You have taken your first steps in this cruel world,' he says quietly. 'Soon, you will have to decide whether you are willing to face what lies ahead.'
An older villager approaches you, his ey.zh: An older villager approaches you, his eyes heavy with knowledge. 'You have taken your first steps in this cruel world,' he says quietly. 'Soon, you will have to decide whether you are willing to face what lies ahead.'

The wildling's eyes light up with hope..zh: The wildling's eyes light up with hope. 'You are our only chance,' she says. 'The cave of the beasts lies deep in the forest. May the gods protect you.'

'Brutal beasts living in a cave in the woods attack us relentlessly. We face extinction. Please, help us survive.'

In the throne room of the citadel, you f.ru: In the throne room of the citadel, you find a magnificent scepter of obsidian. It must have belonged to the king of this lost city. Dark knowledge flows from it. Do you keep it?

The survivor is given shelter and care..ru: The survivor is given shelter and care. That night, he calls you to his hut. Though dying, his eyes are clear. 'Thank you for your kindness, may fortune favor you always.' he whispers with his last breath.
The survivor is given shelter and care..zh: The survivor is given shelter and care. That night, he calls you to his hut. Though dying, his eyes are clear. 'Thank you for your kindness, may fortune favor you always.' he whispers with his last breath.

A stranger arrives at the village, barel.ru: A stranger arrives at the village, barely clinging to life. He speaks of his settlement to the north, where food shortages drove villagers to kill each other in desperation. He asks to stay for a few nights to recover.

The woman from the village approaches yo.zh: The woman from the village approaches you again, her face radiant with gratitude. 'I had to thank you properly,' she says, her voice warm. 'Things went... very well. I made this ring for you.' She hands you a ring with a smaller ring attached to it.

A woman from the village approaches you,.ru: A woman from the village approaches you, her cheeks faintly flushed. She hesitates before speaking, eyes cast down: 'I was wondering if you might spare some leather. I'd like to craft something... for my partner. A harness. To surprise him with.'
A woman from the village approaches you,.zh: A woman from the village approaches you, her cheeks faintly flushed. She hesitates before speaking, eyes cast down: 'I was wondering if you might spare some leather. I'd like to craft something... for my partner. A harness. To surprise him with.'

You grant the stranger shelter. At dawn,.ru: You grant the stranger shelter. At dawn, he has vanished. Only his robes remain, and within them lies a book bound in human skin. Its pages whisper forbidden knowledge.
You grant the stranger shelter. At dawn,.zh: You grant the stranger shelter. At dawn, he has vanished. Only his robes remain, and within them lies a book bound in human skin. Its pages whisper forbidden knowledge.

You refuse the stranger entry. He leaves.ru: You refuse the stranger entry. He leaves screaming curses in an alien tongue. Before dawn, a barbarian tribe attacks as if summoned by his cries, killing ${actualDeaths} villagers. In the morning you find a book on the ground, bound in human skin.

Your indecision frustrates the archer. H.ru: Your indecision frustrates the archer. He shakes his head and leaves, taking his expertise elsewhere.

You offer him the feeding ring you still.ru: You offer him the feeding ring you still kept in a locked chest. The mercenary examines it with interest, slipping it onto his own finger. 'A nice ring,' he says, 'but not enough. I'll return tomorrow to collect the gold.'
You offer him the feeding ring you still.zh: You offer him the feeding ring you still kept in a locked chest. The mercenary examines it with interest, slipping it onto his own finger. 'A nice ring,' he says, 'but not enough. I'll return tomorrow to collect the gold.'

You bid the merchant farewell. He tips h.zh: You bid the merchant farewell. He tips his hat and mutters about the road ahead.

A weathered merchant arrives, his cart o.ru: A weathered merchant arrives, his cart overflowing with wares. His eyes glint with avarice as he murmurs 'I have rare items for sale'.
A weathered merchant arrives, his cart o.zh: A weathered merchant arrives, his cart overflowing with wares. His eyes glint with avarice as he murmurs 'I have rare items for sale'.

You purchase the nightshade bow schemati.ru: Вы покупаете чертёж лука ночной тени. Торговец мрачно усмехается: «Дизайн этого лука жесток. Его стрелы отравят врагов.»
You purchase the nightshade bow schemati.zh: 你买下了夜影弓蓝图。商人阴森地笑着：「这弓的设计很残忍，箭矢会毒杀你的敌人。」

You purchase the skull lantern. Forged f.ru: Вы покупаете фонарь из черепа. Выкованный из проклятых костей, его жуткий свет проведёт вас через глубины.
You purchase the skull lantern. Forged f.zh: 你买下了颅骨灯笼。以诅咒之骨锻造，幽光将引你穿越最深深渊。

You purchase the tarnished compass. Arti.ru: Вы покупаете потускневший компас. Артефакт исчезнувшей цивилизации — его стрелка указывает на скрытые места.
You purchase the tarnished compass. Arti.zh: 你买下了黯淡指南针。vanished 文明的遗物，指针指向隐藏之处。

You purchase a tattered map fragment..zh: 你买下一块残破的地图片段。

You purchase the crow harness. A special.ru: Вы покупаете упряжь для ворона — специально сделанную для гонцов-корней.
You purchase the crow harness. A special.zh: 你买下了乌鸦挽具——专为信使乌鸦打造。

You drink the Elixir of Clarity. Your mi.ru: Вы пьёте Эликсир ясности. Разум становится легче.
You drink the Elixir of Clarity. Your mi.zh: 你饮下清晰灵药，心智变得轻盈。

You purchase a bottle of Veinfire Elixir.ru: Вы покупаете флакон Эликсира жилового огня.

You purchase the Book of Trials. The mer.ru: Вы покупаете Книгу испытаний. Торговец понимающе улыбается: «Путеводитель для тех, кто следит за своим путём.»
You purchase the Book of Trials. The mer.zh: 你买下了试炼之书。商人会意地微笑：「供追踪旅程者参阅的指南。」

You purchase the Book of Craftsmanship..ru: Вы покупаете Книгу ремесла. Торговец одобрительно кивает: «Старый ремесленный том, изношенный, но полный мудрости. Шепчет секреты строителям.»
You purchase the Book of Craftsmanship..zh: 你买下了工艺之书。商人赞许地点头：「工匠之册，陈旧却智慧充盈，会向建造者低语秘密。」

You purchase the Book of War. The mercha.ru: Вы покупаете Книгу войны. Торговец серьёзно кивает: «Знания давно павшего восточного королевства. С ней вы лучше поймёте последствия решений.»
You purchase the Book of War. The mercha.zh: 你买下了战争之书。商人庄重地点头：「来自远东失落王国的知识，助你更懂抉择的后果。」

You purchase the reinforced rope. This r.ru: Вы покупаете укреплённую верёвку — она выдержит огромную нагрузку и достанет до глубин пещеры.
You purchase the reinforced rope. This r.zh: 你买下了强化绳索，可承受巨大拉力，抵达最深洞穴。

As you buy the occultist's map the merch.ru: Покупая карту оккультиста, вы слышите шёпот торговца: «Старый оккультист спрятал тайны в глубокой камере пещеры. Карта укажет путь.»
As you buy the occultist's map the merch.zh: 买下神秘学家地图时，商人低语：「一位老神秘学家把秘密藏在洞穴深处，此图会指引你。」

As you purchase the giant trap, the merc.ru: Покупая гигантскую ловушку, вы видите усмешку торговца: «Ею можно поймать нечто гигантское в лесу. Используйте с умом.»
As you purchase the giant trap, the merc.zh: 买下巨型陷阱时，商人咧嘴笑道：「这能在林中困住庞然大物，请谨慎使用。」

You purchase the arbalest schematic. The.ru: Вы покупаете чертёж арбалета. Торговец разворачивает сложный план: «Работа мастера-инженера. С ним можно создать мощное оружие.»
You purchase the arbalest schematic. The.zh: 你买下了弩蓝图。商人展开精密图纸：「大师工程师的设计，可据此打造强力武器。」

You purchase the compound bow. The merch.ru: Вы покупаете составной лук. Торговец одобрительно кивает: «Точное оружие исчезнувшей цивилизации. Послужит вам верой и правдой.»
You purchase the compound bow. The merch.zh: 你买下了复合弓。商人赞许地点头：「vanished 文明的高精度武器，会很好地服侍你。」

You purchase the stormglass halberd sche.ru: Вы покупаете чертёж алебарды из штормglass. Торговец показывает выцветшие планы: «По этому чертежу можно выковать чудовищно мощную алебарду.»
You purchase the stormglass halberd sche.zh: 你买下了风暴玻璃戟蓝图。商人展示褪色图纸：「据此可锻造威力惊人的戟。」

You purchase the natharit pickaxe. The m.ru: Вы покупаете кирку из натарита. Торговец протягивает прочный инструмент: «Невероятно прочная кирка из неизвестного материала. Качество исключительное.»
You purchase the natharit pickaxe. The m.zh: 你买下了纳塔里特镐。商人递来坚固工具：「未知材质的超耐久镐，品质非凡。」

You decline the monk's offer. He bows re.ru: You decline the monk's offer. He bows respectfully and begins his journey back to the mountains.
You decline the monk's offer. He bows re.zh: You decline the monk's offer. He bows respectfully and begins his journey back to the mountains.

You don't have enough resources for the.ru: You don't have enough resources for the tribute.
You don't have enough resources for the.zh: You don't have enough resources for the tribute.

The monk accepts your tribute with a sol.ru: The monk accepts your tribute with a solemn nod and reveals detailed plans for a skeleton key. “This key is said to open any lock,” he says, before departing.
The monk accepts your tribute with a sol.zh: The monk accepts your tribute with a solemn nod and reveals detailed plans for a skeleton key. “This key is said to open any lock,” he says, before departing.

The monk's eyes widen at the sight of go.ru: The monk's eyes widen at the sight of gold. 'This will help the monastery greatly,' he says, drawing out detailed plans for a skeleton key. “This key is said to open any lock,” he says, before departing.
The monk's eyes widen at the sight of go.zh: The monk's eyes widen at the sight of gold. 'This will help the monastery greatly,' he says, drawing out detailed plans for a skeleton key. “This key is said to open any lock,” he says, before departing.

A monk from a mountain monastery arrives.ru: A monk from a mountain monastery arrives in the village. 'I hear you found a mysterious chest, he says softly. 'The monastery knows how to open it. Offer a tribute, and I will share the secret.'
A monk from a mountain monastery arrives.zh: A monk from a mountain monastery arrives in the village. 'I hear you found a mysterious chest, he says softly. 'The monastery knows how to open it. Offer a tribute, and I will share the secret.'

You took too long to decide. The monks'.ru: You took too long to decide. The monks' offer expires.
You took too long to decide. The monks'.zh: You took too long to decide. The monks' offer expires.

You pay the monks for their map. It reve.ru: You pay the monks for their map. It reveals the location of the Hidden Library deep in the cave.
You pay the monks for their map. It reve.zh: You pay the monks for their map. It reveals the location of the Hidden Library deep in the cave.

You decline the monks' offer. The opport.ru: You decline the monks' offer. The opportunity is lost.
You decline the monks' offer. The opport.zh: You decline the monks' offer. The opportunity is lost.

The one-eyed crow returns from the Mount.ru: The one-eyed crow returns from the Mountain Monastery with a sealed scroll. The monks offer to sell you a map to a hidden library deep within the cave. They ask for 250 Золото.
The one-eyed crow returns from the Mount.zh: The one-eyed crow returns from the Mountain Monastery with a sealed scroll. The monks offer to sell you a map to a hidden library deep within the cave. They ask for 250 黄金.

The villagers demand to build a monolith.ru: The villagers demand to build a monolith in the village center, a monument to appease the darkness that creeps into their minds. Through sacrifice of animals they want to find peace.
The villagers demand to build a monolith.zh: The villagers demand to build a monolith in the village center, a monument to appease the darkness that creeps into their minds. Through sacrifice of animals they want to find peace.

The moment you hear the first ring, dark.ru: The moment you hear the first ring, darkness swallows you whole. You dream of a vast city of glass and steel, filled with strange lights and people who move with purpose you cannot understand. When you awake, the bell has vanished, but a bell-shaped mark burns on your forearm.
The moment you hear the first ring, dark.zh: The moment you hear the first ring, darkness swallows you whole. You dream of a vast city of glass and steel, filled with strange lights and people who move with purpose you cannot understand. When you awake, the bell has vanished, but a bell-shaped mark burns on your forearm.

The risk is too great. That same day, a.ru: The risk is too great. That same day, a tradesman arrives and offers 500 Золото for the bell. You accept immediately, relieved to be rid of the cursed object. The tradesman departs with a knowing smile.
The risk is too great. That same day, a.zh: The risk is too great. That same day, a tradesman arrives and offers 500 黄金 for the bell. You accept immediately, relieved to be rid of the cursed object. The tradesman departs with a knowing smile.

You open the sealed chest with the skele.ru: You open the sealed chest with the skeleton key. Inside, resting on faded velvet, lies a golden bell covered in grotesque engravings and strange symbols written across its surface.
You open the sealed chest with the skele.zh: You open the sealed chest with the skeleton key. Inside, resting on faded velvet, lies a golden bell covered in grotesque engravings and strange symbols written across its surface.

Within is a book which age you cannot gu.ru: Within is a book which age you cannot guess. Its cover is long gone, the pages are torn, yet the perfectly written letters are still sharp. As you carefully turn the pages, you realize it teaches the slow shaping of the self through repetition.
Within is a book which age you cannot gu.zh: Within is a book which age you cannot guess. Its cover is long gone, the pages are torn, yet the perfectly written letters are still sharp. As you carefully turn the pages, you realize it teaches the slow shaping of the self through repetition.

One late evening, you hear a gentle knoc.ru: One late evening, you hear a gentle knock on the door of the estate. As you open it, no one is there, only something bound in dark brown leather resting on the doorstep.
One late evening, you hear a gentle knoc.zh: One late evening, you hear a gentle knock on the door of the estate. As you open it, no one is there, only something bound in dark brown leather resting on the doorstep.

You crumple the note and let it fall fro.ru: You crumple the note and let it fall from your fingers. You understand the words, yet you cannot make any sense of them. As the paper drifts away, you catch something carried on the wind, faint and distant. It sounds like soft, lonely weeping fading into the night.
You crumple the note and let it fall fro.zh: You crumple the note and let it fall from your fingers. You understand the words, yet you cannot make any sense of them. As the paper drifts away, you catch something carried on the wind, faint and distant. It sounds like soft, lonely weeping fading into the night.

As dusk settles, you find a piece of pap.ru:
As dusk settles, you find a piece of paper on the doorstep of your estate. Someone left a note in a careful, elegant handwriting: 
 "I hope you're enjoying your time here. If you do, please consider supporting the journey ahead, either by visiting the shop or donating. Your help keeps this world alive and free to enjoy. Thank you!"
As dusk settles, you find a piece of pap.zh:
As dusk settles, you find a piece of paper on the doorstep of your estate. Someone left a note in a careful, elegant handwriting: 
 "I hope you're enjoying your time here. If you do, please consider supporting the journey ahead, either by visiting the shop or donating. Your help keeps this world alive and free to enjoy. Thank you!"

You grant ${obj} shelter for the night..ru: You grant ${obj} shelter for the night. By morning, ${subj} has vanished without a trace, leaving your bed still warm and ${silverStolen} Серебро missing.
You grant ${obj} shelter for the night..zh: You grant ${obj} shelter for the night. By morning, ${subj} has vanished without a trace, leaving your bed still warm and ${silverStolen} 白银 missing.

You politely refuse ${poss} request. ${c.ru: You politely refuse ${poss} request. ${cap} looks disappointed but nods in understanding, disappearing into the evening mist without another word.
You politely refuse ${poss} request. ${c.zh: You politely refuse ${poss} request. ${cap} looks disappointed but nods in understanding, disappearing into the evening mist without another word.

An attractive young woman in fine clothe.ru: An attractive young woman in fine clothes arrives at the estate as the sun sets. She smiles warmly at you and asks, 'Might I have shelter in your hut for the night? I've traveled far and have nowhere else to go.'
An attractive young woman in fine clothe.zh: An attractive young woman in fine clothes arrives at the estate as the sun sets. She smiles warmly at you and asks, 'Might I have shelter in your hut for the night? I've traveled far and have nowhere else to go.'

An attractive young man in fine clothes.ru: An attractive young man in fine clothes arrives at the estate as the sun sets. He smiles warmly at you and asks, 'Might I have shelter in your hut for the night? I've traveled far and have nowhere else to go.'
An attractive young man in fine clothes.zh: An attractive young man in fine clothes arrives at the estate as the sun sets. He smiles warmly at you and asks, 'Might I have shelter in your hut for the night? I've traveled far and have nowhere else to go.'

You ignore the offer. The viking eventua.ru: Вы игнорируете предложение. викинг в конце сплёвывает и уходит с боевым топором, бормоча о вашем неуважении.
You ignore the offer. The viking eventua.zh: 你无视提议。维京人最终吐口水离去，扛着战斧，抱怨你的无礼。

You ignore the offer. The viking eventua.ru: Вы игнорируете предложение. викинг кивает и уходит с боевым топором.
You ignore the offer. The viking eventua.zh: 你无视提议。维京人最终点头，扛着战斧离去。

The viking takes the payment with a cold.ru: викинг принимает плату с холодной усмешкой. «Может, стоило быть щедрее раньше, а не нападать. Тогда топор стоил бы дешевле», — говорит он, уходя.
The viking takes the payment with a cold.zh: 维京人冷笑着收下报酬。「也许早该慷慨些，而不是攻击我。那时买斧会更便宜，」他说完离去。

Happy with the trade the viking nods app.ru: Довольный сделкой, викинг одобрительно кивает и уходит.
Happy with the trade the viking nods app.zh: 维京人对交易满意，赞许地点头离去。

You decline the offer. The viking spits.ru: Вы отказываетесь. викинг сплёвывает, бормоча проклятия, и уходит с топором. «Надо было заплатить, когда была возможность», — рычит он.
You decline the offer. The viking spits.zh: 你拒绝提议。维京人吐口水，咒骂着扛斧离去。「有机会时你该付钱的，」他低吼。

You decline the offer. The viking nods r.ru: Вы отказываетесь. викинг уважительно кивает и уходит с топором.
You decline the offer. The viking nods r.zh: 你拒绝提议。维京人庄重地点头，扛斧离去。

The viking builder returns to your villa.ru: The viking builder returns to your village, carrying a magnificent war axe. 'I forged this Nordic War Axe in my homeland. It shall be yours... for a price.'
The viking builder returns to your villa.zh: The viking builder returns to your village, carrying a magnificent war axe. 'I forged this Nordic War Axe in my homeland. It shall be yours... for a price.'

You drink the amber liquid. It burns as.ru: You drink the amber liquid. It burns as it goes down, but you feel stronger than before.
You drink the amber liquid. It burns as.zh: You drink the amber liquid. It burns as it goes down, but you feel stronger than before.

You decide not to risk it and toss the t.ru: You decide not to risk it and toss the trinket into the woods. It disappears into the undergrowth.
You decide not to risk it and toss the t.zh: You decide not to risk it and toss the trinket into the woods. It disappears into the undergrowth.

Your hesitation costs you. The trinket s.ru: Your hesitation costs you. The trinket slips from your fingers and shatters on a rock, the amber liquid seeping into the earth.
Your hesitation costs you. The trinket s.zh: Your hesitation costs you. The trinket slips from your fingers and shatters on a rock, the amber liquid seeping into the earth.

While chopping wood, you find a trinket.ru: While chopping wood, you find a trinket with glowing amber liquid inside. The liquid swirls hypnotically. Do you drink it?
While chopping wood, you find a trinket.zh: While chopping wood, you find a trinket with glowing amber liquid inside. The liquid swirls hypnotically. Do you drink it?

The forest gods accept the sacrifice. Th.ru: The forest gods accept the sacrifice. The figures vanish, and an ebony ring is found on the altar where the villagers were offered. Peace returns to the woods.
The forest gods accept the sacrifice. Th.zh: The forest gods accept the sacrifice. The figures vanish, and an ebony ring is found on the altar where the villagers were offered. Peace returns to the woods.

The forest accepts the sacrifice. The fi.ru: The forest accepts the sacrifice. The figures vanish, and an ebony ring is found on the altar where the villagers were offered. But the horror of the sacrifice drives {{actualAdditionalDeaths}} villagers to take their own lives.
The forest accepts the sacrifice. The fi.zh: The forest accepts the sacrifice. The figures vanish, and an ebony ring is found on the altar where the villagers were offered. But the horror of the sacrifice drives {{actualAdditionalDeaths}} villagers to take their own lives.

Your refusal to sacrifice innocent lives.ru: Your refusal to sacrifice innocent lives somehow pleases the forest gods. The appearances vanish, and you find an ebony ring left as a gift.
Your refusal to sacrifice innocent lives.zh: Your refusal to sacrifice innocent lives somehow pleases the forest gods. The appearances vanish, and you find an ebony ring left as a gift.

You refuse the sacrifice. The forest rem.ru: You refuse the sacrifice. The forest remains silent for now. The threat lingers.
You refuse the sacrifice. The forest rem.zh: You refuse the sacrifice. The forest remains silent for now. The threat lingers.

Your indecision angers the villagers. {{.ru: Your indecision angers the villagers. {{actualDepartures}} villagers, frustrated with your lack of leadership, pack their belongings and leave in disgust.
Your indecision angers the villagers. {{.zh: Your indecision angers the villagers. {{actualDepartures}} villagers, frustrated with your lack of leadership, pack their belongings and leave in disgust.

You refuse the sacrifice. During the nig.ru: You refuse the sacrifice. During the night, {{actualDisappearances}} villager wanders into the woods as if sleepwalking, drawn by a voice only they could hear. They are never seen again.
You refuse the sacrifice. During the nig.zh: You refuse the sacrifice. During the night, {{actualDisappearances}} villager wanders into the woods as if sleepwalking, drawn by a voice only they could hear. They are never seen again.

You refuse the sacrifice. During the nig.ru: You refuse the sacrifice. During the night, {{actualDisappearances}} villagers wander into the woods as if sleepwalking, drawn by a voice only they could hear. They are never seen again.
You refuse the sacrifice. During the nig.zh: You refuse the sacrifice. During the night, {{actualDisappearances}} villagers wander into the woods as if sleepwalking, drawn by a voice only they could hear. They are never seen again.

While hunting, villagers report unsettli.ru: While hunting, villagers report unsettling figures in the forest. They are terrified. Village elders say the forest gods demand four villagers as sacrifice.
While hunting, villagers report unsettli.zh: While hunting, villagers report unsettling figures in the forest. They are terrified. Village elders say the forest gods demand four villagers as sacrifice.

You give no order. Rumors spread, fear c.ru: You give no order. Rumors spread, fear curdles into disgust, and village work falters.
You give no order. Rumors spread, fear c.zh: You give no order. Rumors spread, fear curdles into disgust, and village work falters.

You don't have enough food to hold a pro.ru: You don't have enough food to hold a proper funeral.
You don't have enough food to hold a pro.zh: You don't have enough food to hold a proper funeral.

You order funeral rites and feed the mou.ru: You order funeral rites and feed the mourners. Grief remains, but the village steadies.
You order funeral rites and feed the mou.zh: You order funeral rites and feed the mourners. Grief remains, but the village steadies.

You uncover a group of conspirators and.ru: You uncover a group of conspirators and order their execution. Justice is swift, and fear recedes.
You uncover a group of conspirators and.zh: You uncover a group of conspirators and order their execution. Justice is swift, and fear recedes.

You consecrate the body to the cross. Th.ru: You consecrate the body to the cross. The villagers recoil in disgust, but the power of the cross seems to have grown.
You consecrate the body to the cross. Th.zh: You consecrate the body to the cross. The villagers recoil in disgust, but the power of the cross seems to have grown.

One morning, villagers make a cruel disc.ru: One morning, villagers make a cruel discovery. A young man hangs crucified on the Pale Cross, his head bowed and his body swaying faintly in the cold morning wind.
One morning, villagers make a cruel disc.zh: One morning, villagers make a cruel discovery. A young man hangs crucified on the Pale Cross, his head bowed and his body swaying faintly in the cold morning wind.

The druid bows his head. 'Then let it be.ru: The druid bows his head. 'Then let it be raised.'
The druid bows his head. 'Then let it be.zh: The druid bows his head. 'Then let it be raised.'

'Perhaps this was wisdom. Perhaps it was.ru: 'Perhaps this was wisdom. Perhaps it was fear,' the druid says before leaving into the forest.
'Perhaps this was wisdom. Perhaps it was.zh: 'Perhaps this was wisdom. Perhaps it was fear,' the druid says before leaving into the forest.

The blind druid returns, his milky eyes.ru: The blind druid returns, his milky eyes rest on the bone totems: 'You have offered the gods much. Raise them a symbol to prove your devotion.'
The blind druid returns, his milky eyes.zh: The blind druid returns, his milky eyes rest on the bone totems: 'You have offered the gods much. Raise them a symbol to prove your devotion.'

As the villagers near, the figure vanish.ru: As the villagers near, the figure vanishes. In its place lies a raven-feather mantle, shimmering with otherworldly power.
As the villagers near, the figure vanish.zh: As the villagers near, the figure vanishes. In its place lies a raven-feather mantle, shimmering with otherworldly power.

The investigation goes wrong. One of the.ru: The investigation goes wrong. One of the villagers screams in the mist and is never seen again. The others flee in terror.
The investigation goes wrong. One of the.zh: The investigation goes wrong. One of the villagers screams in the mist and is never seen again. The others flee in terror.

The pale figure moves with inhuman speed.ru: The pale figure moves with inhuman speed. ${actualDeaths} villagers vanish into the mist, their screams echoing through the trees.
The pale figure moves with inhuman speed.zh: The pale figure moves with inhuman speed. ${actualDeaths} villagers vanish into the mist, their screams echoing through the trees.

The villagers stay close to the village..ru: The villagers stay close to the village. By evening, the figure is gone.
The villagers stay close to the village..zh: The villagers stay close to the village. By evening, the figure is gone.

At dawn, one of the villagers who claime.ru: At dawn, one of the villagers who claimed to have seen the figure is found dead in his bed, his face frozen in terror.
At dawn, one of the villagers who claime.zh: At dawn, one of the villagers who claimed to have seen the figure is found dead in his bed, his face frozen in terror.

At dawn, villagers glimpse a tall, pale,.ru: At dawn, villagers glimpse a tall, pale, slender figure at the woods’ edge. What do you do?
At dawn, villagers glimpse a tall, pale,.zh: At dawn, villagers glimpse a tall, pale, slender figure at the woods’ edge. What do you do?

In the citadel's lowest chambers you fin.ru: In the citadel's lowest chambers you find a colossal gate forged from an unknown, unyielding metal. Perhaps the alchemist creations will be able to open it.
In the citadel's lowest chambers you fin.zh: In the citadel's lowest chambers you find a colossal gate forged from an unknown, unyielding metal. Perhaps the alchemist creations will be able to open it.

You pick up the crimson leather mask. It.ru: You pick up the crimson leather mask. It feels warm to the touch.
You pick up the crimson leather mask. It.zh: You pick up the crimson leather mask. It feels warm to the touch.

You decide the raven's gift carries too.ru: You decide the raven's gift carries too much mystery. As you walk away, you hear the raven's call echoing through the trees.
You decide the raven's gift carries too.zh: You decide the raven's gift carries too much mystery. As you walk away, you hear the raven's call echoing through the trees.

While hunting, you see an oddly large bl.ru: While hunting, you see an oddly large black raven staring at you from a broken tree. As you approach it, Suddenly it croaks, sounding like it's saying a word again and again. Then it flies away. In front of the tree lies a mask made of deep red leather. Do you take it?
While hunting, you see an oddly large bl.zh: While hunting, you see an oddly large black raven staring at you from a broken tree. As you approach it, Suddenly it croaks, sounding like it's saying a word again and again. Then it flies away. In front of the tree lies a mask made of deep red leather. Do you take it?

The knight waited but you did not respon.ru: The knight waited but you did not respond. 'Perhaps another time,' he says before continuing his journey.
The knight waited but you did not respon.zh: The knight waited but you did not respond. 'Perhaps another time,' he says before continuing his journey.

You pay the builder. He teaches the vill.ru: You pay the builder. He teaches the villagers the ancient nordic techniques for constructing longhouses.

Your men overpower the builder and force.ru: Your men overpower the builder and force him to share his knowledge. Reluctantly, he teaches you the secrets of longhouse construction.
Your men overpower the builder and force.zh: Your men overpower the builder and force him to share his knowledge. Reluctantly, he teaches you the secrets of longhouse construction.

The builder proves stronger than expecte.ru: The builder proves stronger than expected! He fights back fiercely, killing ${actualCasualties} men before escaping into the wilderness.

You refuse the builder's offer and send.ru: You refuse the builder's offer and send him away. He shrugs and disappears into the wilderness, taking his knowledge with him.
You refuse the builder's offer and send.zh: You refuse the builder's offer and send him away. He shrugs and disappears into the wilderness, taking his knowledge with him.

One day, a strong man wearing thick furs.ru: One day, a strong man wearing thick furs stands at the gates. He says he comes from the far north and is a skilled builder. For a little gold, he will teach you how to build big houses that can hold many villagers.
One day, a strong man wearing thick furs.zh: One day, a strong man wearing thick furs stands at the gates. He says he comes from the far north and is a skilled builder. For a little gold, he will teach you how to build big houses that can hold many villagers.

The village has grown into a city. What.ru: The village has grown into a city. What began as a small settlement now stands as a thriving center of stone and smoke.
The village has grown into a city. What.zh: The village has grown into a city. What began as a small settlement now stands as a thriving center of stone and smoke.

The village elder returns, his expressio.ru: The village elder returns, his expression grave. 'The time has come,' he says. 'You have taken your first steps on a long and unforgiving path. What lies ahead is deeper, darker, and more demanding. Decide now whether you will continue this journey.'
The village elder returns, his expressio.zh: The village elder returns, his expression grave. 'The time has come,' he says. 'You have taken your first steps on a long and unforgiving path. What lies ahead is deeper, darker, and more demanding. Decide now whether you will continue this journey.'

A village elder approaches you. He speak.ru: A village elder approaches you. He speaks quietly. 'You stand at the beginning of a long path filled with trials. Very скоро, you must choose whether you will continue this journey.'
A village elder approaches you. He speak.zh: A village elder approaches you. He speaks quietly. 'You stand at the beginning of a long path filled with trials. Very 即将, you must choose whether you will continue this journey.'

You confront the villager. They turn to.ru: You confront the villager. They turn to you with that black-eyed smile and whisper something that makes your mind reel. The words echo in your head for days.
You confront the villager. They turn to.zh: You confront the villager. They turn to you with that black-eyed smile and whisper something that makes your mind reel. The words echo in your head for days.

As you approach, the villager's smile wi.ru: As you approach, the villager's smile widens impossibly. They collapse, black fluid pouring from their eyes and mouth. You realize they've been dead for hours.
As you approach, the villager's smile wi.zh: As you approach, the villager's smile widens impossibly. They collapse, black fluid pouring from their eyes and mouth. You realize they've been dead for hours.

You avoid the villager, but you feel the.ru: You avoid the villager, but you feel their hollow gaze following you wherever you go. Sleep becomes difficult. After a few nights, the villager is found dead in his bed, his clothes soaked through with a black, reeking slime.
You avoid the villager, but you feel the.zh: You avoid the villager, but you feel their hollow gaze following you wherever you go. Sleep becomes difficult. After a few nights, the villager is found dead in his bed, his clothes soaked through with a black, reeking slime.

One of the villagers has begun staring a.ru: One of the villagers has begun staring at nothing for hours. When you approach, their eyes are completely black. They smile when they notice you watching.

You grab the nearest villager and shake.ru: You grab the nearest villager and shake them. They blink once and return to normal, but whisper 'It's coming' before resuming their work. The others slowly follow suit.
You grab the nearest villager and shake.zh: You grab the nearest villager and shake them. They blink once and return to normal, but whisper 'It's coming' before resuming their work. The others slowly follow suit.

When you touch one villager, they crumbl.ru: When you touch one villager, they crumble to dust. The others snap out of their trance and scream, pointing at the sky. For just a moment, you see it too, something vast and hungry watching from above.
When you touch one villager, they crumbl.zh: When you touch one villager, they crumble to dust. The others snap out of their trance and scream, pointing at the sky. For just a moment, you see it too, something vast and hungry watching from above.

You crane your neck skyward and suddenly.ru: You crane your neck skyward and suddenly see it, something immense and impossible that exists between the clouds. Your mind rejects what it witnesses, but the image burns itself into your memory forever.
You crane your neck skyward and suddenly.zh: You crane your neck skyward and suddenly see it, something immense and impossible that exists between the clouds. Your mind rejects what it witnesses, but the image burns itself into your memory forever.

All the villagers have stopped their wor.ru: All the villagers have stopped their work and stand motionless, staring at the empty sky. They remain like this for hours, unblinking, while tears of black liquid stream down their faces. When you follow their gaze, you see only ordinary clouds, but something feels terribly wrong.

They remain like this for hours, unblinking, while tears of black liquid stream down their faces. When you follow their gaze, you see only ordinary clouds, but something feels terribly wrong.

A hooded figure in stained robes arrives.ru: A hooded figure in stained robes arrives at your village. 'I am a firecrafter,' he says with an echoing voice. 'I can teach you to craft a bomb of extreme power, that tears reality itself. But knowledge has its price.'

You welcome the nomads and offer support.ru: You welcome the nomads and offer support. In return, they teach your people how to build fur tents.

You decline to help. The tribe leader no.zh: You decline to help. The tribe leader nods respectfully and leads their people back into the wilderness.

A small tribe of nomads approaches the v.ru: A small tribe of nomads approaches the village. Their leader speaks: 'We have traveled far and seek a place to call home. Help us settle and we will teach your people how to raise fur tents.'
A small tribe of nomads approaches the v.zh: A small tribe of nomads approaches the village. Their leader speaks: 'We have traveled far and seek a place to call home. Help us settle and we will teach your people how to raise fur tents.'

The collector sighs and turns away. 'In.zh: 收藏家叹息着转身。「我游历中发现许多古代文明遗物，他们远比我们先进，」他低语着消失在黑暗中。

A low hum seeps from beneath the hood. '.ru: Из-под капюшона доносится низкий гул. «Великий взрыв уничтожил большинство артеfactов древней цивилизации. Остатки редки и разбросаны», — бормочет он.
A low hum seeps from beneath the hood. '.zh: 兜帽下渗出低鸣。「大爆炸摧毁了古代文明的大部分遗物，残存者稀少而分散，」他呢喃。

A faint breath escapes the collector. 'I.ru: Коллекционер едва дышит. «В странствиях я много узнал о древней цивилизации. До Великого взрыва магии не было — она родилась в тот миг», — шепчет он, уходя.
A faint breath escapes the collector. 'I.zh: 收藏家轻轻吐息。「我在旅途中学到许多古代文明之事。大爆炸前世上没有魔法，它在那一刻诞生，」他离去时低语。

You turn down his offer. He shrugs and w.zh: 你回绝提议。他耸耸肩，走回林中。

You refuse the deal. The woodcutter frow.zh: 你拒绝交易。樵夫皱眉，但未争辩。

Upon inspection, you see nothing unusual.ru: Upon inspection, you see nothing unusual in the well. It must have been a trick of the light or your imagination. The unease lingers, but you feel slightly better.
Upon inspection, you see nothing unusual.zh: Upon inspection, you see nothing unusual in the well. It must have been a trick of the light or your imagination. The unease lingers, but you feel slightly better.

You lean over the well's edge. Your refl.ru: You lean over the well's edge. Your reflection grins back with too many teeth and whispers secrets about what was once built where the village stands now. You pull back, but the knowledge remains, burning in your mind.
You lean over the well's edge. Your refl.zh: You lean over the well's edge. Your reflection grins back with too many teeth and whispers secrets about what was once built where the village stands now. You pull back, but the knowledge remains, burning in your mind.

You board up the well with wooden planks.ru: You board up the well with wooden planks, forbidding all access to the unholy water. Building a new well takes too long to finish, and ${thirstDeaths} of the villagers perish of thirst.
You board up the well with wooden planks.zh: You board up the well with wooden planks, forbidding all access to the unholy water. Building a new well takes too long to finish, and ${thirstDeaths} of the villagers perish of thirst.

The surface of the village well shows re.ru: The surface of the village well shows reflections that don't match reality. You see yourself, but older, with hollow eyes and a mouth full of darkness.
The surface of the village well shows re.zh: The surface of the village well shows reflections that don't match reality. You see yourself, but older, with hollow eyes and a mouth full of darkness.

You count the villagers and there are th.ru: You count the villagers and there are three more than there should be. The extra ones look exactly like villagers who died months ago. They work, eat, and sleep normally, but their eyes hold depths of ancient malice.
You count the villagers and there are th.zh: You count the villagers and there are three more than there should be. The extra ones look exactly like villagers who died months ago. They work, eat, and sleep normally, but their eyes hold depths of ancient malice.

You banish the young woman from the vill.ru: You banish the young woman from the village. She convinces ${actualLeavers} sympathetic villagers to leave with her, abandoning your settlement forever.
You banish the young woman from the vill.zh: You banish the young woman from the village. She convinces ${actualLeavers} sympathetic villagers to leave with her, abandoning your settlement forever.

Shortly after the sacrifice is carried o.ru: Shortly after the sacrifice is carried out at the Black Monolith, ${actualLeavers} horrified villagers pack their belongings and leave in disgust.
Shortly after the sacrifice is carried o.zh: Shortly after the sacrifice is carried out at the Black Monolith, ${actualLeavers} horrified villagers pack their belongings and leave in disgust.

You agree to end the practice of human s.ru: You agree to end the practice of human sacrifice. The woman proposes destroying the Black Monolith and building a pure white obelisk in its place cleansing the darkness from the people's minds.
You agree to end the practice of human s.zh: You agree to end the practice of human sacrifice. The woman proposes destroying the Black Monolith and building a pure white obelisk in its place cleansing the darkness from the people's minds.

A young woman approaches you with tears.ru: A young woman approaches you with tears streaming down her face. 'Both my parents were sacrificed to that cursed monolith,' she cries. 'This barbaric behavior has to stop!'
A young woman approaches you with tears.zh: A young woman approaches you with tears streaming down her face. 'Both my parents were sacrificed to that cursed monolith,' she cries. 'This barbaric behavior has to stop!'

A knock comes from the estate door. A fi.ru: A knock comes from the estate door. A figure completely hulled in dark robes stands in the shadows outside. It whispers: 'Voiceless it cries, wingless flutters, toothless bites, mouthless mutters.'
A knock comes from the estate door. A fi.zh: A knock comes from the estate door. A figure completely hulled in dark robes stands in the shadows outside. It whispers: 'Voiceless it cries, wingless flutters, toothless bites, mouthless mutters.'

A knock comes from the estate door. A fi.ru: A knock comes from the estate door. A figure completely hulled in dark robes stands in the shadows outside. It whispers: 'A lady's desire, grown in darkness, shining with pale light.'
A knock comes from the estate door. A fi.zh: A knock comes from the estate door. A figure completely hulled in dark robes stands in the shadows outside. It whispers: 'A lady's desire, grown in darkness, shining with pale light.'

The figure shakes its head before vanish.ru: The figure shakes its head before vanishing. The next day, a dense fog creeps into the village. Жители claim to see shifting shapes within it, many are too fearful to leave their huts.
The figure shakes its head before vanish.zh: The figure shakes its head before vanishing. The next day, a dense fog creeps into the village. 村民 claim to see shifting shapes within it, many are too fearful to leave their huts.

The figure nods its head slightly before.ru: The figure nods its head slightly before fading into the darkness. By morning, a small bag of gold rests upon the estate's doorstep.
The figure nods its head slightly before.zh: The figure nods its head slightly before fading into the darkness. By morning, a small bag of gold rests upon the estate's doorstep.

The cloaked figure returns to the estate.ru: The cloaked figure returns to the estate under the pale moonlight. Its voice echoes: 'Goes on four feet in the morning, two feet at noon, and three feet in the evening.'
The cloaked figure returns to the estate.zh: The cloaked figure returns to the estate under the pale moonlight. Its voice echoes: 'Goes on four feet in the morning, two feet at noon, and three feet in the evening.'

The cloaked figure returns to the estate.ru: The cloaked figure returns to the estate under the pale moonlight. Its voice echoes: 'Can't hurt you, but leaves you with scars.'
The cloaked figure returns to the estate.zh: The cloaked figure returns to the estate under the pale moonlight. Its voice echoes: 'Can't hurt you, but leaves you with scars.'

The figure gives a faint nod and vanishe.ru: The figure gives a faint nod and vanishes into the night. At dawn, a weathered leather pouch of gold lies where it stood.
The figure gives a faint nod and vanishe.zh: The figure gives a faint nod and vanishes into the night. At dawn, a weathered leather pouch of gold lies where it stood.

Once again, the mysterious figure appear.ru: Once again, the mysterious figure appears at the estate. It whispers with a low voice: 'All things it devours, turns bones to dust, slays kings, wears mountains down, erases towns.'
Once again, the mysterious figure appear.zh: Once again, the mysterious figure appears at the estate. It whispers with a low voice: 'All things it devours, turns bones to dust, slays kings, wears mountains down, erases towns.'

Once again, the mysterious figure appear.ru: Once again, the mysterious figure appears at the estate. It whispers with a low voice: 'Has fingers yet no flesh, no feathers, no scales, no bone.'
Once again, the mysterious figure appear.zh: Once again, the mysterious figure appears at the estate. It whispers with a low voice: 'Has fingers yet no flesh, no feathers, no scales, no bone.'

The figure tilts its head in quiet ackno.ru: The figure tilts its head in quiet acknowledgment before stepping back into the dim. When morning comes, a worn coin purse of gold is found outside the door.
The figure tilts its head in quiet ackno.zh: The figure tilts its head in quiet acknowledgment before stepping back into the dim. When morning comes, a worn coin purse of gold is found outside the door.

The hulled figure appears once more at t.ru: The hulled figure appears once more at the estate. It whispers: 'Flies without wings, cries without eyes, darkness follows wherever it goes.'
The hulled figure appears once more at t.zh: The hulled figure appears once more at the estate. It whispers: 'Flies without wings, cries without eyes, darkness follows wherever it goes.'

The hulled figure appears once more at t.ru: The hulled figure appears once more at the estate. It whispers: 'Soft, delicate, silky, but if you're wrapped in me, you scream.'
The hulled figure appears once more at t.zh: The hulled figure appears once more at the estate. It whispers: 'Soft, delicate, silky, but if you're wrapped in me, you scream.'

The figure lowers its hooded head for a.ru: The figure lowers its hooded head for a moment before dissolving into the shadows. A small sack of gold remains behind on the cold ground.
The figure lowers its hooded head for a.zh: The figure lowers its hooded head for a moment before dissolving into the shadows. A small sack of gold remains behind on the cold ground.

The nightly figure appears one more time.ru: The nightly figure appears one more time at the estate. Its voice silently echoes through the night: 'Your eyes are open, I am there, your eyes are closed, I am there too.'
The nightly figure appears one more time.zh: The nightly figure appears one more time at the estate. Its voice silently echoes through the night: 'Your eyes are open, I am there, your eyes are closed, I am there too.'

The nightly figure appears one more time.ru: The nightly figure appears one more time at the estate. Its voice silently echoes through the night: 'Poor have me, rich need me. Eat me, you die.'
The nightly figure appears one more time.zh: The nightly figure appears one more time at the estate. Its voice silently echoes through the night: 'Poor have me, rich need me. Eat me, you die.'

The figure bows its head in silent rever.ru: The figure bows its head in silent reverence before fading completely. A big sack of gold lays on the ground where it stood.
